message:
fix: join left side dropped OR filterGroups — data correctness bug

executeJoin() built leftQuery with only AND filters, omitting
filterGroups (OR filters). Any query like
  .where("x = 1 OR y = 2").join(right, ...)
would silently ignore the OR condition on the left side, returning
unfiltered rows from the join.

Added filterGroups to leftQuery and passed it to FilterOperator.
